title: USGS and University of Alaska Reaffirm Long-term Climate Science Partnership
summary: The new Alaska Climate Adaptation Science Center hosting agreement will bring with it 11.4 million dollars in funding and continue a 14-year long collaboration between the University of Alaska (UA) and the United States Geological Survey (USGS).
